ddls:
CREATE TABLE "robot_sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., encoder, IMU) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor's function */,
  "placement" TEXT /* Physical location on the robot where the sensor is placed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the sensor */,
  "range" REAL /* Range of the sensor */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the control parameter */,
  "param_value" REAL /* Value of the control parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the control parameter's role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the parameter was last updated */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the control algorithm associated with the parameter */,
  "parameter_group" TEXT /* Group to which the parameter belongs */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the parameter value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment map */,
  "map_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment map */,
  "map_version" TEXT /* Version of the environment map */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the map was last updated */,
  "map_size" TEXT /* Size of the environment map */,
  "obstacle_density" TEXT /* Density of obstacles in the environment */,
  "lighting_conditions" TEXT /* Lighting conditions */,
  "terrain_type" TEXT /* Type of terrain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, admin) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "robot_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each robot version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the robot version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version's features */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Version of the software running on the robot */,
  "hardware_version" TEXT /* Version of the hardware */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Summary of changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training data set */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot version used for the training */,
  "start_time" REAL /* Start time of the data capture */,
  "end_time" REAL /* End time of the data capture */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training data */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the environment map */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the control algorithm used for training */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Summary of performance metrics achieved during training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_data_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES robot_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_versions" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm version */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the control algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the control algorithm */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm's features */,
  "algorithm_type" TEXT /* Type of algorithm */,
  "development_team" TEXT /* Team responsible for the algorithm development */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* List of dependencies or libraries used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot version */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the control algorithm version */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the performance metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the environment map */,
  "training_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the training data set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithm_versions ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES robot_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_training_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_data_id") REFERENCES training_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot version */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the control algorithm version */,
  "error_time" REAL /* Timestamp of the error occurrence */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Description of the error */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution or action taken to address the error */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was active when the error occurred */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the error */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithm_versions ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES robot_versions ("version_id")
)
